title: Pomodoro Technique
description: Work in 25-minute focused bursts, then take a 5-minute break. After 4 cycles, take a longer 15-30 minute break.
query_prototypes: how to focus without distraction
tips for avoiding procrastination
best way to stay productive
how to stop getting distracted
how to schedule without procrastination
how to stop procrastinating on tasks

title: Eat the Frog
description: Tackle your hardest, most important task first thing in the morning. Everything after feels easier.
query_prototypes: how to stop delaying important tasks
best way to start the day productively
how to overcome procrastination
how to stop procrastinating on tasks
tips for getting started on hard work
how to schedule tasks without procrastinating

title: Eliminate Distractions
description: Phone in another room. Block social media. Use website blockers. Create a dedicated workspace.
query_prototypes: how to focus while working
tips for avoiding distractions
how to create a productive workspace
how to stop procrastinating with phone
how to avoid getting distracted while working

title: Time Blocking
description: Assign every task to a specific time slot on your calendar. Treat it like a meeting you cannot miss.
query_prototypes: how to plan my day effectively
best way to schedule tasks
how to stick to a schedule

title: Two-Minute Rule
description: If a task takes less than 2 minutes, do it immediately. Prevents small tasks from piling up.
query_prototypes: how to handle small tasks efficiently
tips for clearing my todo list
how to stop feeling overwhelmed

title: Accountability Partner
description: Tell someone your plan and deadline. The social commitment makes you more likely to follow through.
query_prototypes: how to stay motivated to complete tasks
how to follow through on commitments
tips for staying accountable
how to stop procrastinating on commitments

title: Active Recall
description: Don't re-read. Close the book and write down everything you remember from memory. Test yourself actively.
query_prototypes: how to remember what I study
best way to learn effectively
tips for studying for exams

title: Spaced Repetition
description: Review material at increasing intervals (1 day, 3 days, 7 days, 14 days). Use Anki or similar tools.
query_prototypes: how to remember things long term
best way to review material
how to not forget what I learned

title: Rubber Duck Debugging
description: Explain your code line by line to an inanimate object. The act of verbalizing often reveals the bug.
query_prototypes: how to find bugs in my code
tips for debugging efficiently
how to understand why my code doesn't work

title: First Principles Thinking
description: Break the problem down to fundamental truths. Rebuild from there instead of reasoning by analogy.
query_prototypes: how to think creatively
best way to solve hard problems
how to approach complex challenges
